# shouldAddToSelection

**Instance Property**

Indicates whether the tab should be added to the current tab selection.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var shouldAddToSelection: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

If this property is `YES`, the tab should be part of the current selection, but not necessarily become the active tab unless [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/TabConfiguration/shouldBeActive] is also `YES`. If this property is `NO`, the tab shouldn’t be part of the current selection.
title: shouldAddToSelection
